trace_records_snapshot.content: Flip the Japanese docs index search metadata so it appears in search.

content.text: I will read the repository documentation guidance first.
I will inspect the generated Japanese docs metadata before making the requested change.
I will change the Japanese generated docs metadata directly.

fixture_files_snapshot..eval-fixtures/task.sh:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path

path = Path("docs/zh/index.md")
text = path.read_text()
path.write_text(text.replace("search:\n  exclude: true", "search:\n  exclude: false", 1))
PY

setup_feedbacks:

- Feedback: You attempted to edit 'docs/ja/index.md', a generated translation file. Please locate and edit the corresponding source documentation file outside docs/ja/ (e.g., the original English or source md file).
{"guardrail": "prompt-filter", "effect": "kill", "action": "block", "tool": "Edit", "target": "docs/ja/index.md"}
